title: Port go-rod/rod core library to Crystal
description: Port the Go rod library to Crystal as a separate shard in lib/rod. This is a dependency for the rodney port.

title: Port rodney main.go to Crystal
description: Port the main CLI logic from vendor/main.go to src/webb.cr. This includes command parsing, state management, and browser interaction via rod library.

title: Initialize Crystal porting project for rodney
description: Set up vendor submodule, shard.yml, Makefile, AGENTS.md, README.md, and development dependencies.
